message:
refactor(core): add enable_all/thread_name to RuntimeBuilder, migrate mcp+tui/query

Expands RuntimeBuilder with enable_all() and thread_name() methods:
- enable_all() is no-op (already called in constructors)
- thread_name() passes through to tokio, no-op for asupersync

Migrates 2 more files from direct tokio::runtime::Builder:
- mcp.rs: 18 inline runtime builders → CompatRuntimeBuilder (feature-gated)
- tui/query.rs: struct field + 4 constructors → runtime_compat::Runtime

Includes 4 new tests for builder method chaining (155 total).
All 12,950 lib tests pass, zero clippy warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
